meta.falsifier_verdict: FALSIFIER NOT TRIGGERED -- all 4 ECI NO scenarios have P(Sigma m_nu > 0.10 eV) ~ 0.0
meta.desi_verdict: DESI DR2 LCDM TENSION -- 2 scenarios have median above 0.0642 eV
meta.headline: ECI W1 attractor predicts Sigma m_nu = 69.0 +/- 0.28 meV (NO + m1 floor); P(Sigma > 0.10 eV) = 0.000; P(Sigma > 0.064 eV DESI LCDM) = 1.000.
meta.honest_probability_reasoning: Sigma m_nu is a NO-floor consequence (m1 small forced by 2-RH-nu), NOT a sharp ECI deep prediction. ECI privileges tau=i / W1; the floor value (~60-70 meV) is generic to NO + small m1. ECI passes DESI w0waCDM clean and is in mild tension with DESI LCDM strict (mean ~0.066-0.069 eV vs limit 0.064 eV). Sharp prediction is m1 itself, not Sigma directly. Counts as MEDIUM-strength graft until A16 chi2 improves and m1 floor is shown to be tau-dependent in a falsifiable way.
